title: Quality & Food Safety Auditor
description: The technical department can be described as the ‘Conscience of the Business’ with a core remit of keeping the business informed to ensure strong strategic and tactical decision, provide customer and supplier confidence in relation to food safety and quality standards and to safeguard the business by maintaining a strong due diligence defense. This is achieved by providing assurance that legal, customer, supplier and business standards of food quality and safety are maintained, ensuring procedural compliance, understanding and effectiveness and driving remedial actions to resolve the root cause of any issues and prevent recurrence. Additionally, the department has a responsibility to drive continuous improvement as an outcome of the core remit by setting standards and keeping abreast of developments that may impact the food industry. This role is working 36 hours per week, Friday - Sunday, 6am-6pm.

title: EMEA HE&R Region Lead
description: JOB DESCRIPTION: The EMEA Health Economics & Reimbursement (HE&R) Lead is a senior regional executive responsible for ensuring high‑quality access execution across the EMEA region. This includes leading a team of 6+ country HE&R Leads to deliver reimbursement, coverage, pricing, and reimbursement policy outcomes that enable sustainable access and drive business growth for Abbott’s medical device portfolio. This role serves as a critical partner to EMEA Divisional Vice Presidents, actively engaging to understand their business priorities, elevating clear access considerations, proactively identifying, evaluating and educating on shifting market dynamics, and delivering aligned and integrated action plans through regional HE&R business leaders and country teams. As a member of the HE&R Leadership Team, this role ensures that EMEA market requirements are incorporated into global product development, evidence strategies, and launch planning. When evidence or policy information is incomplete, this leader provides structured, risk‑adjusted recommendations to enable enterprise decision‑making; reflecting global HE&R leadership expectations for lifecycle integration. The role also partners closely with Government Affairs to monitor reimbursement‑relevant policy shifts, evaluate business impact, and shape Abbott’s external advocacy strategy, maintaining a targeted presence in regional professional societies and forums aligned with the EMEA access agenda. ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES Lead and supervise 6+ Country HE&R teams across EMEA, ensuring consistent, competitive, high‑quality execution of reimbursement and pricing strategies. Establish an operating rhythm for performance reviews, barrier escalation, best‑practice sharing, and launch readiness to ensure accountability and execution discipline. Ensure country-level plans are aligned to regional priorities and address local payer, HTA, and funding requirements. Proactively identify risks in access execution and drive cross-functional mitigation plans with clear owners and timelines Serve as a trusted access advisor to EMEA Divisional Vice Presidents, and partner to EMEA HE&R Regional Business Leaders, by translating business priorities into clear access considerations and in-market execution plans. Provide concise, actionable guidance on access trade-offs, portfolio prioritization, and resource needs. Support the development of access components of regional business plans with the regional HE&R business leads, ensuring alignment across Commercial, Medical, Clinical and Regulatory teams at the country level. Ensure country‑level pathway requirements are surfaced to Global/Regional Business Leads, and incorporated into local launch planning Ensure evidence requirements, payer expectations, and pathway prerequisites are systematically incorporated early into global and regional planning. When information is incomplete, lead structured risk assessments and propose risk-adjusted recommendations, including scenario assumptions and decision triggers. Partner with Government Affairs to track reimbursement, pricing, HTA, and funding policy dynamics across EMEA and translate developments into business impact assessments. Shape strategic responses and build business preparedness plans to navigate policy changes. Coordinate strategic functional representation in regional forums, societies, and coalitions aligned to advancing the EMEA access agenda Build, develop, and retain a high-performing team of country HE&R leaders and support their professional growth. Drive regional capability building in payer engagement, HTA navigation, economic value communication, and access-focused launch readiness. Provide clear performance expectations, coaching, succession planning, and accountability frameworks Oversee regional budget planning and resource allocation. Elevate access literacy across regional and country teams by providing structured guidance, tools, education and communication frameworks. Represent EMEA HE&R execution on the Global HE&R leadership team EDUCATION & COMPETENCIES Advanced degree in an associated field required (e.g., MPH, MBA, PhD, Health Economics, Public Policy, Health Services Research) 12+ years’ experience in Market Access, Reimbursement, Health Economics, Payer Strategy, or related roles in medical devices or healthcare; Previous experience in country level access leadership preferred Demonstrated success leading country access teams or driving access outcomes across multiple EMEA markets. Strong business partnership skills with the ability to influence senior leadership and shape strategy Proven ability to synthesize complex policy or evidence information into clear, actionable insights. Strong analytical, strategic thinking, and communication skills. Experience leading teams, developing talent, and fostering execution accountability. Ability to navigate complex matrix organizations and represent the function effectively in regional and global governance processes. SUCCESS METRICS (Internal) Execution of reimbursement and pricing strategy across priority EMEA markets. Achievement of competitive country-level access outcomes, including improved time-to-access metrics and reduced execution barriers. Regional business preparedness and ability to anticipate and respond to policy changes in collaboration with Government Affairs and key business partners. Quality of partnership with EMEA DVPs and cross-functional leaders, as reflected in alignment, execution discipline, and strategic influence. Integration of EMEA requirements into global evidence and product planning, including risk-adjusted recommendations when required. Team performance and capability growth, including retention and development of country HE&R leaders. Impact of external advocacy engagements aligned to the EMEA access agenda, reinforcing expectations from prior regional and global HE&R roles The base pay for this position is N/A In specific locations, the pay range may vary from the range posted. title: Productie Planner
description: JOB DESCRIPTION: Over Abbott Abbott is een wereldwijde leider in de gezondheidszorg en zet zich in om mensen te helpen langer en beter te leven. Met ongeveer 130.000 medewerkers in meer dan 160 landen ontwikkelt Abbott een breed portfolio op het gebied van diagnostiek, medische hulpmiddelen, voeding en geneesmiddelen. In Nederland werken dagelijks circa 2.000 collega’s op 9 locaties aan duurzame oplossingen voor enkele van de belangrijkste uitdagingen binnen de gezondheidszorg van vandaag. Over Abbott Nutrition Abbott Nutrition levert wetenschappelijk onderbouwde voedingsproducten voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Onze producten ondersteunen de groei van kinderen en helpen te voorzien in de unieke voedingsbehoeften van mensen met chronische aandoeningen. Op onze productielocatie in Zwolle produceren wij verschillende vertrouwde voedingsmerken voor kinderen en volwassenen, waaronder PediaSure, Isomil en Ensure. Bij Abbott ontwikkelen we technologieën die levens veranderen en worden we gedreven door onze missie om voor iedereen, in elke levensfase, de juiste zorg te bieden. Wil jij deel uitmaken van deze missie en een bijdrage leveren aan de maatschappij? Ter versterking van onze productielocatie zijn wij op zoek naar een gemotiveerde en analytische Productieplanner die graag werkt op het snijvlak van productie, logistiek en service excellence. Dit betreft een kantoorfunctie in Zwolle. Wat ga je doen Als Productieplanner speel je een sleutelrol in het waarborgen van een betrouwbare supply chain en operationele continuïteit. Je werkt nauw samen met de lokale productieteams en het centrale planningsteam in Zwolle om alles soepel te laten verlopen. Je verantwoordelijkheden zijn onder andere: Monitoren en verbeteren van interne en externe servicelevels Dagelijkse afstemming met interne en externe stakeholders over prioriteiten binnen productie-, voorraad- en transportplanning Optimaliseren van analyses en KPI‑rapportages (bijvoorbeeld in Power BI) Fungeren als back‑up binnen het planningsteam om continuïteit te waarborgen Snel reageren op ad‑hoc verzoeken binnen de supply chain Wat breng je mee Een afgeronde hbo‑opleiding (Logistiek, Supply Chain Management, Bedrijfskunde of vergelijkbaar) Sterke analytische vaardigheden en een proactieve werkhouding Ervaring in productieplanning of supply chain is een sterke pré Goede communicatieve vaardigheden en het vermogen om cross‑functioneel samen te werken Flexibiliteit en veerkracht in een dynamische productieomgeving Uitstekende Excel‑vaardigheden; ervaring met Power BI is een plus Vloeiend in Nederlands en Engels (mondeling en schriftelijk) Beschikbaar voor een fulltime dienstverband (40 uur per week) Wat wij bieden Een uitdagende functie binnen een wereldwijde organisatie met een betekenisvolle missie Een professionele en samenwerkingsgerichte werkomgeving in Zwolle Ruimte voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling, opleidingen en doorgroeimogelijkheden Een marktconform salaris en aantrekkelijke arbeidsvoorwaarden Een moderne werkomgeving waar initiatief en verbeterideeën worden gewaardeerd Solliciteren Ben je enthousiast over deze functie? Dien dan je sollicitatie in via de knop ‘Apply’ hierboven. Sollicitaties worden doorlopend beoordeeld. The base pay for this position is N/A In specific locations, the pay range may vary from the range posted. description: En tant que Service Delivery Manager, vous êtes l’interlocuteur privilégié du client dans le cadre d'un contrat de services. A ce titre, vous êtes le garant du respect des engagements, de la Qualité de Service globale et de la satisfaction client ainsi que de la rentabilité opérationnelle de ses comptes. Le périmètre fonctionnel des prestations attendues est décomposé en 4 lots : Lot 1 : BUILD Élaborer des solutions standard de cybersécurité et des services associés, sur la base des besoins exprimés par la Compagnie, à des coûts maîtrisés. Lot 2.1: DEPLOY Déployer des solutions et des services de cybersécurité sur nos sites industriels : installation/configuration, pilotage Lot 2.2: RUN Maintenir en conditions opérationnelles et de sécurité (MCO/MCS) les solutions et services de cybersécurité conformément aux SLA définis (Servie Level Agreement). Lot 3: Cyber Operations Assister les sites à mettre en oeuvre des mesures de remédiation lorsque des alertes et des incidents de cybersécurité sont signalés par le SIEM/SOC (Security Operation Centre) du client. Le Service Delivery Manager (SDM) assure l’interface entre le client et les différentes prestations des lots du dispositif, il est le point d’entrée qui peut solliciter tout interlocuteur interne pour répondre à la demande client. Vos missions : En relation direct avec les équipes d’exploitation, votre mission comprend les activités suivantes : Analyser les enjeux et criticités client au sein des équipes opérationnelles Piloter, dans certains cas, la mise en place du service managé (outils d’exploitation, supervision) Elaborer le reporting et assurer l’animation des comités Gérer et anticiper les situations de crise Garantir le respect des SLA (Service Level Agreement) auprès des clients Piloter les plans d’actions mis en place avec les équipes clients et les prestataires externes Suivre la satisfaction client, proposer un plan d’amélioration continu et optimiser les services contractualisés Assurer un rôle de conseil et participer au développement de la relation commerciale en identifiant les opportunités business et en les adressant aux équipes commerciales. Rendre compte de son activité et alerter si nécessaire La langue de communication orale pour la gouvernance du contrat sera le français. L’anglais sera utilisé dans les correspondances avec les sites, hormis pour les sites francophones. Tous les documents et livrables écrits seront rédigés en anglais.

title: Technical Compliance  Manager
description: At apetito, we are committed to delivering the highest standards of food safety, quality and compliance. We’re looking for an experienced Technical Compliance Manager to help us maintain and continually improve these standards. As Technical Compliance Manager, you will lead the validation, verification and audit of our UK food safety and quality systems. You’ll work closely with technical and operational teams to ensure full compliance with legal requirements and maintain our AA grade BRCGS Food Safety certification. This is a fantastic time to join us. As we grow towards £300m in turnover, we’re investing in a new, state‑of‑the‑art frozen food manufacturing facility alongside our existing site in Trowbridge. Your responsibilities will cover both sites, offering significant opportunity for development as our operations expand.

title: Content Writer - Retailer (3rd party)
description: JOB DESCRIPTION: GIỚI THIỆU VỀ ABBOTT Abbott là công ty chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn cầu, tiên phong trong nghiên cứu khoa học và tạo ra những đột phá trong công nghệ chăm sóc sức khỏe để giúp mọi người sống khỏe mạnh hơn. Chúng tôi luôn hướng tới tương lai, dự đoán và đáp ứng những thay đổi trong khoa học và công nghệ y khoa. Những công nghệ mang tính thay đổi cuộc sống của Abbott trải dài nhiều lĩnh vực từ dinh dưỡng, chẩn đoán đến thiết bị y tế và dược phẩm. LÀM VIỆC TẠI ABBOTT Tại Abbott, bạn có thể làm công việc tạo ra giá trị và ý nghĩa cho cộng đồng. Bạn được trao cơ hội để học hỏi và phát triển, chăm sóc bản thân và gia đình, đồng thời thể hiện và phát huy tối đa tiềm năng của bản thân trong cả sự nghiệp và cuộc sống. Bạn sẽ có cơ hội: Phát triển sự nghiệp tại một công ty toàn cầu, nơi bạn có thể hiện thực hóa ước mơ nghề nghiệp của mình. Làm việc tại một môi trường được công nhận là “Nơi làm việc tốt nhất” tại nhiều quốc gia và được tạp chí Fortune (Mỹ) vinh danh là một trong những công ty được ngưỡng mộ nhất thế giới. Trở thành một phần của doanh nghiệp hàng đầu, được công nhận là nơi làm việc tốt nhất với môi trường tuyệt vời cho sự đa dạng và hòa nhập. Yêu cầu tư duy sáng tạo, am hiểu nền tảng TikTok & Facebook, có khả năng sáng tạo kịch bản video, xây dựng content hub và định hướng phát triển kênh cho đại lý. Giúp đại lý nâng cao năng lực bán hàng online và mở rộng tệp khách hàng qua các nền tảng số thông quan content. MỤC TIÊU VỊ TRÍ Hỗ trợ hệ thống đại lý chuyển đổi thành công từ mô hình bán hàng truyền thống sang online. Xây dựng hệ thống nội dung chuẩn, dễ nhân bản cho đại lý áp dụng trên TikTok & Facebook. Nâng cao năng lực phát triển kênh và bán hàng online của đại lý. Tăng lượng tiếp cận organic và mở rộng tệp khách hàng mới cho hệ thống đại lý. NỘI DUNG CÔNG VIỆC CHÍNH A. Xây dựng kỹ năng nền cho đại lý khi chuyển đổi từ truyền thống lên online Xây dựng content hub (kho nội dung mẫu) để đại lý dễ dàng tham khảo và áp dụng cho kênh bán hàng online. Xây dựng kỹ năng livestream cho đại lý: hướng dẫn kịch bản, cách tương tác, kỹ thuật chốt đơn trong livestream. Sáng tạo kịch bản video xây kênh và bán hàng phù hợp với từng nhóm đại lý và sản phẩm. Theo dõi, đánh giá và feedback về chất lượng video của đại lý; nhân bản những video tốt để lan tỏa trong hệ thống. B. Nâng cao năng lực phát triển kênh bán hàng của đại lý Định hướng chiến lược phát triển kênh TikTok & Facebook cho từng đại lý. Lập kế hoạch nội dung (content calendar) dài hạn, đảm bảo tính nhất quán và hiệu quả. Phát triển nội dung tăng lượng tiếp cận organic, mở rộng tệp khách hàng tiềm năng. Cập nhật xu hướng, algorithm changes và best practices trên các nền tảng. C. Phối hợp và đào tạo Phối hợp với team marketing và đội ngũ đại lý để triển khai nội dung đúng hướng và đúng tiến độ. Hỗ trợ đào tạo đại lý về kỹ năng sáng tạo nội dung, quay video và livestream. Đo lường hiệu quả nội dung, rút ra insight để cải thiện liên tục. YÊU CẦU Kinh nghiệm & Trình độ 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm viết content và sản xuất nội dung số, ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm với short video (TikTok, Facebook Reels). Có kinh nghiệm viết kịch bản video bán hàng, livestream hoặc xây kênh là lợi thế lớn. Kinh nghiệm làm việc trong ngành FMCG, dinh dưỡng, sức khỏe hoặc Mẹ & Bé là điểm cộng. Kỹ năng chuyên môn Tư duy content marketing mạnh, hiểu customer journey và conversion funnel. Khả năng viết kịch bản video hấp dẫn, tự nhiên, phù hợp với phong cách nền tảng (native content). Thành thạo các công cụ: Capcut, Canva,… Nắm bắt nhanh xu hướng nền tảng, algorithm và hành vi người dùng trên TikTok & Facebook. Tố chất cá nhân Chủ động, trách nhiệm cao, có tinh thần hợp tác. Giao tiếp tốt, có khả năng làm việc với nhiều nhóm đại lý khác nhau. Bắt trend nhanh, thích ứng linh hoạt với thay đổi của thị trường. Đam mê digital marketing và content creation. description: Project Architect – Community + Live, Workplace & Government (CWG) markets - Sacramento, CA HGA, a leading architectural, engineering, and planning firm, is seeking a talented and driven Project Architect to join our growing CWG practice in Sacramento, CA. We’re looking for someone with strong communication, presentation, time management, and interpersonal skills who thrives in a collaborative environment and is passionate about advancing great design. In this role, you’ll work closely with Senior Designers, Project Managers, and other Project Architects to develop innovative and technically sound design solutions. You’ll lead the creation of detailed documentation while maintaining our firm’s high standards for design quality and client service. What You’ll Do: Lead the development of construction documents and ensure design intent is accurately carried through. Translate complex project goals into creative and functional design solutions. Collaborate across disciplines to coordinate architectural and engineering systems. Participate in client meetings and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders. Ensure project milestones and deadlines are met with attention to detail and quality. Why HGA? Collaborative Culture: Join a firm celebrated for integrated, cross‑disciplinary teamwork and a shared commitment to design excellence. Professional Growth: Build your career with mentorship, continuing education, and clear pathways to leadership. Meaningful Work: Shape the environments where people live, work, and play through projects that make a lasting impact. In this role you will: Design and u nderstand and contribute to the project's design philosophy. Provide major input in developing design and building performance strategies and convey these effectively to team members. Lead project teams to develop complete document sets based on the project phase. Provide technical design input and solutions to project challenges, supporting the overall design concept. Oversee technical design efforts, detailed design development, project coordination, and quality control during all project phases, collaborating closely with the Senior Designer. Execute applicable agency review analysis (accessibility, zoning, life-safety, etc.). Actively collaborate with and coordinate the work of consultants and knowledge resources to ensure project deliverables are coordinated, integrated, and support the design concept and performance goals. Set an example for team effort through the spirit of cooperation while directing, organizing, and mentoring junior staff. C ontribute to the preparation of design documents and lead the detailed development of construction documents during all project phases. Ensure complete, accurate, and coordinated project documentation. Oversee and perform construction administration duties, including reviewing shop drawings, material samples, RFI’s, RFP’s, and change orders for conformance with design. What you will need to have: Bachelor’s degree in Architecture California Architectural Licensure required LEED accreditation preferred 7 - 10 years of experience, including work on small to mid-size projects Deep understanding of programming, codes, and technical detailing Strong leadership and collaboration skills in team environments Proficiency in Revit required; experience with AutoCAD, SketchUp, Enscape, and other graphic tools desired. Expertise with project management software and Microsoft Office Suite products needed Excellent communication, presentation, and time management skills Salary Information: The pay range listed aligns to the geography of the office for which this position is posted. Actual compensation will be based upon work experience, education, licensure requirements and/or skill level and will be finalized at the time of offer. Individuals in this role working more than 24 hours a week on a regular basis are eligible to participate in HGA’s robust benefit programs which include an annual bonus and success sharing bonus program, 401(k) guaranteed contribution, paid parental leave, medical, dental and life insurance plans as well as PTO and short- and long-term disability programs. Salary Range: $98,300 - $115,000 depending on qualifications and experience . Additional Information: At HGA, you’ll do the best work of your career. We design with impact by diving deep into the people and passions that shape every place. Empathy fuels us, curiosity drives us, and meaningful work leads to innovation. We celebrate individuality, embrace flexibility, and thrive together in the office three days a week. Join our nationally recognized, award-winning team of architects, engineers, and interior designers — help us shape what’s next. Learn more about us here . AMOA SIRH - Paie, GA et DSN F/H
description: Le SIRH d’OBS SA est constitué de plusieurs solutions SI permettant de supporter les processus RH de l’entreprise. Ces solutions adressent l’ensemble des processus RH, du recrutement à la gestion opérationnelle des salariés (la gestion administrative, la gestion des temps, la paie et l’ensemble du Talent Management). Ces processus doivent répondre aux objectifs d’excellence d’OBS SA aussi bien au niveau de l’expérience salarié qu’à celui de la performance opérationnelle des acteurs RH. Le rôle de l’équipe SIRH est de mettre à la disposition du réseau RH et/ou des salariés et managers de l’entreprise, des outils modernes et performants leur permettant de mener à bien leur mission. Elle est le garant du bon fonctionnement des systèmes d’informations RH (le SIRH) mais aussi est force de proposition pour l’adaptation des outils, en adéquation avec les évolutions des besoins des utilisateurs. La gestion de la paie / GA et DSN est réalisée sur l’outil HR Access V9 avec un portail collaborateur permettant la mise à jour de certaines données directement par les collaborateurs. L’application permet une gestion fluide et intégrée de la paie et du déclaratif. Nous sommes à la recherche de notre futur(e) AMOA SIRH – Paie / GA / DSN. Vous interviendrez sur les applications liées à la paie , à la gestion administrative et à la DSN principalement sur la partie RUN. Votre rôle sera, en appui au responsable SIRH Paie d’assurer l’expertise, la conformité réglementaire du RUN et de participer éventuellement à des projets annexes impactant l’univers SIRH Paie. Vous serez accompagné sur votre périmètre par le responsable SIRH en binôme et vous serez en soutien auprès des équipes métier (équipes de paie, administration du personnel) dont l’objectif primordial est la satisfaction de nos clients (salariés) via l’excellence de la gestion de la paie et de leur expérience utilisateur. Vous aurez comme principales missions : Gestion RUN et optimisation des processus de paie : Vous assurerez le suivi du run de paie, la gestion des anomalies de paie ainsi que le suivi des évolutions. Vous veillerez donc à garantir la fluidité des processus et à améliorer leur efficacité en définissant et rédigeant les spécifications générales et détaillées des évolutions légales / réglementaires et/ou spécifiques à mettre en place. Veille et conformité règlementaire : Vous effectuerez une veille légale et conventionnelle constante afin de vous assurer que les processus de paie sont conformes aux exigences réglementaires. Vous accompagnerez les gestionnaires de paie dans les adaptations nécessaires et serez garant(e) de la mise en conformité des processus de paie en qualifiant et validant les recettes fonctionnelles réalisées par l’éditeur. Accompagnement des utilisateurs : Vous assurerez une communication régulière auprès des utilisateurs concernant les nouveautés, les incidents, et les mises à jour applicatives. Vous vulgariserez les évolutions légales auprès d’un public averti en fournissant des procédures, des guides et vous organiserez des formations pour accompagner leur montée en compétences. Ce processus d’accompagnement sera aussi réalisé par une assistance multiple (ticketing) de niveau 2 ou 3 de nos Keys Users.

description: Au sein de l’équipe RH d’Enovacom, portant tous les sujets du domaine RH en autonomie (hormis la paie qui est gérée par une équipe dédiée hors Enovacom), le responsable Relations Sociales gère au quotidien les relations avec les IRP et contribue activement au bon climat social au sein de l’entreprise. participez aux réunions de négociation (en lien avec les relations sociales UES OBS et les expertises de l’équipe) Vous organisez le dialogue avec les organisations syndicales Vous suivez les droits d’alerte et DGI en lien avec la DRH Vous assurez la communication sur les accords (locaux et UES, Groupe) Vous maintenez le lien avec l’écosystème Relations Sociales UES OBS, Orange Vous participez aux réunions de négociation et au CSEC en intérim de la DRH Vous gérez le suivi et la carrière des IRP et vous veillez au respect par les représentants du personnel des dispositions prévues par les accords relatifs aux droits syndicaux Qualité de Vie au Travail : Vous définissez les axes de la politique SMSST, en assurer le suivi et piloter la revue de direction Vous animez la mise à jour du DUERP en collaboration avec les élus et vous mettez en œuvre les actions sur le terrain Vous pilotez et suivez le Programme Annuel de Prévention des Risques Professionnels et d’Amélioration des Conditions de Travail (PAPRIPACT) avec les contributeurs et les Instances Représentatives du Personnel (CSSCT) Vous assurez la relation avec les représentants du personnel sur tous les sujets liés à la prévention (opérationnel et réglementaire) Vous organisez la sensibilisation et l’accompagnement des salariés et des managers sur la santé-sécurité au quotidien (avec le soutien du préventeur-conseil de l’UES) Vous participez aux réunions bimensuelles avec l’équipe prévention de l’UES et vous pilotez les audits SMSST Projets RH : Vous travaillez à la construction des accords collectifs mis en place par l’entreprise, leur communication auprès des salariés et leur mise en œuvre opérationnelle Vous participez aux projets RH que portent les relations sociales, notamment les élections professionnelles Vous serez amené à participer à des projets transverses au sein de l’équipe en fonction de vos appétences et des opportunités

title: Health & Safety Administrator
description: Are you an experienced administrator ready for a new challenge? We are seeking a skilled administrator to support our team of seven safety, health, fire and environmental specialists, helping protect and enhance standards across the entire apetito organisation. With nearly 2,000 employees, plus contractors, operating across around 50 sites — and with continued growth on the horizon — maintaining robust safety, fire prevention and environmental performance is central to how we operate. Ensuring our people stay safe and that we remain a responsible neighbour in every community is an essential part of our mission. In this role, you’ll be at the centre of the team’s work, providing the practical, day‑to‑day support that helps our specialists operate more efficiently and effectively. The variety is broad, the pace is lively and your contribution will be critical to everything we deliver. Based at our Portbury, Bristol, site full time, the typical hours will be Monday - Friday, 8.30am to 5.00pm.

title: B2B2C Delivery Executive
description: JOB DESCRIPTION: ABOUT ABBOTT Abbott is a global healthcare leader that helps people live more fully at all stages of life. Our portfolio of life-changing technologies spans the spectrum of healthcare, with leading businesses and products in diagnostics, medical devices, nutritional and branded generic medicines. Our 114,000 colleagues serve people in more than 160 countries. WORKING AT ABBOTT At Abbott, you can do work that matters, grow, and learn, care for yourself and family, be your true self and live a full life. You will have access to: Career development with an international company where you can grow the career you dream of. A company recognized as a great place to work in dozens of countries around the world and named one of the most admired companies in the world by Fortune. A company that is recognized as one of the best big companies to work for as well as a best place to work for diversity, working mothers, female executives, and scientists. MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES: 1. Delivery Execution & Monitoring • Monitor daily B2B2C order fulfillment from CLPs to Shipping Service Provider of all platforms. • Track delivery performance against SLA, lead time, Shop Health of fulfillment, and service KPIs across O2O operations. • Ensure timely handover of orders from CLPs to shipping providers. • Follow up the return package handed over to CLPs on time. • Follow up on daily fulfillment execution, identifying risks that may impact delivery performance 2. Logistics Shipping Provider Coordination • Coordinate with delivery service providers (e.g. Viettel Post, J&T Express,…) to ensure on time pickups and deliveries. • Align pickup schedules and volume forecasts with logistics partners to support smooth operations. • Follow up with shipping providers to ensure platform SLA compliance. • Escalate and resolve delivery delays, exceptions, or failed deliveries. 3. Internal & External Coordination Work closely with O2O, 3A Logistics, CLPs, Sales & Trade, Platforms to: • Ensure order readiness and inventory availability • Confirm pickup timing • Address operational gaps impacting fulfillment and delivery • Provide daily operational support to CLPs to ensure orders are processed and delivered on time. • Coordinate with internal functions to ensure store onboarding is completed on time with full operational awareness. • Train CLPs on standard packaging and fulfillment requirements for each platform to ensure consistent execution and compliance. 4. Performance Tracking, Inventory & Reporting • Consolidate and prepare daily / weekly supply chain and delivery reports (SLA, backlog, exceptions). • Monitor and follow up on daily inventory status (products & gifts) at store level in line with demand planning. • Track order management and fulfillment performance, working with cross functional teams to address gaps. • Support performance reviews with internal stakeholders and logistics partners. • Coordinate the development and rollout of standard O2O fulfillment reports. 5. Issue Resolution & Continuous Improvement • Manage delivery related incidents end to end, including: Fast delivery rate, late delivery rate, cross-region rate, • Identify recurring fulfillment and delivery issues and propose corrective and preventive actions. • Support the rollout of new supply chain systems and tools, acting as a key user / SME for order management. • Support the Manager in reviewing, sharpening, and improving fulfillment SOPs to enhance operational efficiency and standardization. MINIMUM BACKGROUND/ EXPERIENCE REQUIRED: • Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, Business, or related fields • Project Management & Supply Chain Management • 1–3 years of experience in delivery operations, logistics coordination, or e commerce fulfillment • Experience with B2B2C / O2O / last mile delivery is an advantage • Strong coordination and follow up skills • Good data tracking and reporting capability • Ability to work with multiple stakeholders under time pressure • Problem solving and execution oriented mindset • Teamwork and cooperation • English skill in intermediate • Good skill on Power BI, Power Point & Excel. Follow your career aspirations to Abbott for diverse opportunities with a company that can help you build your future and live your best life. Abbott is an Equal Opportunity Employer, committed to employee diversity. Connect with us at www.abbott.com , on Facebook at www.facebook.com/Abbott and on Twitter @AbbottNews and @AbbottGlobal. The base pay for this position is N/A In specific locations, the pay range may vary from the range posted. description: JOB DESCRIPTION: About Abbott Abbott is a global healthcare leader that helps people live more fully at all stages of life. In Ireland, Abbott employs over 5,000 people across nine sites. We have six manufacturing facilities located in Clonmel, Cootehill, Donegal, Longford and Sligo and a third-party manufacturing management operation in Sligo. Abbott has commercial, support operations and shared services in Dublin and Galway. We have been operating in Ireland since 1946. Abbott Ireland Diabetes Care Division Donegal The Abbott Diabetes Care division based in Donegal Town manufactures FreeStyle blood glucose test strips and FreeStyle Sensors for use in diabetes management. Among Abbott Diabetes Care leading brands are the FreeStyle Precision, FreeStyle Lite and FreeStyle Libre system. Abbott Diabetes Care STEM Graduate Program This is a fantastic opportunity for STEM Graduates to have a rounded work experience as they start their careers. Mentorship and guidance will be provided throughout the program. Upon graduation, candidates will move to their assigned full-time position, having experienced the widest range in the STEM field in ADC Donegal Please note any offer of employment for this position is conditional upon the successful completion of a pre-employment medical examination, including drug and alcohol screening, conducted by a medical practitioner designated by the Company Our STEM Graduate Programme is designed to help you launch your career with confidence . This programme offers a structured, supportive, and hands ‑ on experience , giving you exposure to real projects, expert mentors, and multiple departments -not just observation, but meaningful contribution from day one. By the end of the programme, successful graduates transition into permanent full ‑ time roles , equipped with strong technical capability, cross ‑ functional experience, and a clear career path. What You’ll Experience Rotations & Real ‑ World Impact Structured rotations across Engineering and Technical departments Hands ‑ on involvement in live manufacturing, validation, and process improvement projects Exposure to cross ‑ functional collaboration using tools such as Power BI, JMP, Agile, and DMAIC Learning, Mentorship & Development A well ‑ defined onboarding and mentoring framework Support from: A buddy from a previous graduate cohort A dedicated mentor (from another STEM area) Your line manager and L&D Access to structured L&D modules , including Operational Excellence and Yellow Belt projects Regular career development check ‑ ins and feedback Growth Beyond the Role Participants are given meaningful opportunities to build their leadership capability, confidence, and presentation skills throughout the programme. They engage directly with site leaders through initiatives such as “Day in the Life” sessions, knowledge ‑ sharing forums, and graduate showcases and celebrations, providing valuable exposure and real ‑ world insight. Graduates are also encouraged to actively participate in internal networks, community initiatives, and the organisation’s continuous improvement culture, helping them to develop a strong sense of connection, contribution, and ownership from early in their careers . Who We’re Looking For We’re looking for ambitious, curious, and motivated graduates who want to build a long ‑ term career in STEM within industry. You’ll Bring: A STEM degree (Engineering, Science, Technology, Mathematics or related discipline) A 2:1 degree or higher (or expected) A genuine interest in learning, problem ‑ solving , and impact Bonus (but not essential): Relevant work placement, internship, or project experience Evidence of community involvement, teamwork, or leadership An interest in developing your career locally in Donegal and the North West Why Choose ADC Donegal? Proven pathway from graduate to permanent role Real projects with real responsibility A supportive, people ‑ focused culture A chance to contribute to life ‑ changing medical technology You won’t just “do a graduate programme” — you’ll build a career . Estamos comprometidos a llevar los beneficios de nuestros medicamentos confiables a más personas en los países de más rápido crecimiento del mundo. Nuestro amplio portafolio de medicamentos genéricos de marca diferenciada y de alta calidad abarca múltiples áreas terapéuticas, incluidas la gastroenterología, la salud de la mujer, los cardiometabólicos, el manejo del dolor / sistema nervioso central y las vías respiratorias. Que harás El propósito del rol es brindar soporte a la gestión de NeoSalud mediante la consolidación de información, seguimiento de indicadores y apoyo en la organización de procesos e iniciativas, contribuyendo al orden, control y ejecución del negocio. Consolidación y actualización de información: Apoyar en el recopilación, orden y actualización de bases de datos e información del negocio. Soporte en seguimiento de indicadores y reportes: Apoyar en la elaboración y actualización de reportes y seguimiento de indicadores. Soporte en iniciativas y procesos del área: Apoyar en el seguimiento de iniciativas y tareas del área, asegurando orden y control. Apoyo en elaboración de presentaciones: Brindar soporte en la preparación de presentaciones y materiales de operación. Organización y soporte operativo del área: Apoyar en la coordinación, orden y ejecución de tareas administrativas del área. Cualificaciones requeridas Estudiante de últimos ciclos de Ing. de Sistemas, Ing. Estadística, Ing. Industrial, Administración, Economía o carreras afines. Manejo de excel avanzando, Power BI, Power Query. Capacidad analítica, orden y habilidad de comunicación. Cualificaciones deseables Deseable experiencia previa en prácticas relacionados a análisis de información, reportes o gestión de procesos.
